CONTENT.External links: Josip Ćorluka at National-Football-Teams.comJosip Ćorluka at Sofascore
CONTENT.International career: In October 2020, Ćorluka was called up to represent the Bosnia and Herzegovina national team, for a friendly game against Iran and for the 2020–21 UEFA Nations League games against Netherlands and Italy. He debuted in a home loss against Iran on 12 November 2020.

SUMMARY: Josip Ćorluka (born 3 March 1995) is a Bosnian-Herzegovinian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Bosnian Premier League club Zrinjski Mostar.
